TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ay-al-nan.ke-al-te-s "kamu nu S-pang-ya, Hern√°n Cort√©s, 1485 a mihca 12 a bulad -1547 a mihca 12 a bulad 2 a demiad", midebungay a ziday manawang i Cow-nan-mey-cow a S-pan-ya nu midebungay "Conquistador u imi "misulipay" mapeci' ku macakatay nu kasumamadan a A-ce-te, i Mu-si-ke patizang tu nu midebungay nu Si-pang-ya a singangan, Ay-al-nan.ke-al-te-s atu lecad a zidayan S-pang-ya nu midebungay miwawah tu nu S-pang-ya-mey-cow nu midebungay a zidayan nu saayaway a ngatu. ŚüÉÁąĺŚćó¬∑ÁßĎÁąĺÁČĻśĖĮ(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Hern√°n Cort√©sÔľõ1485ŚĻī12śúą‚ÄĒ1547ŚĻī12śúą2śó•) . nilaculan ke-al-te-s lecuh i Ka-s-ti-ya hungti a kanatalan a May-te-lin-cong zikuz pabalucu' tayza Sin-ta-lu misakawa tu sakauzip, lungatu sanay saayaway tayza i I-s-pa-si-aow-la a subal, zikuz tayni tu i Ku-pa, i Ku-pa ciniza mapabeli a situngus tu sapideput, zikuz mala saka tusa a subal nu Si-pang-ya niyazu'ay a taylin. . 1519 a mihcaan mapili' tu mala Sin-ta-lu nu saka tulu nu mikinsaay nu mikeliday, miedap tu adidid a kalisiw ciniza tuynian sakaputay nu mikisaay. Atu Ku-pa cung-li ci Ti-ya-kee.wi-la-s-kay-ce.te-ku-ay-li-ya-al a kasala'cus, ayaw nu kamulmul niza tu sazikuzay takusan apaluma', ci Ke-al-te-s satu cayay pisikul tuyni a pitakus pataluma'. 1519 . ci Ke-al-s katukuh i Sin-ta-lu tu zikuz, misabalucu' tu sakalaheci, ciniza atu zuma mey-cow a Yincumin malacabay, atu zumaay a Mey-cow a Yincumi malalais, miyung ciniza tu cacay Yincumin a tatayna ci Ma-lin-cye " Tang-na.Ma-li-na" uni pabelin, zikuz mulecuh tu saayaway tatama a wawaan. Yu Ka-pa cong-li musakamu miculcul amizakep ci Ke-al-te-san hawsa,ci Ke-al-te-s atu heni malalebu, miliyung tu zumaay a hitay mala u miedapay nu heni milais makazemec tu, Ke-al-s kakelul sa patigami tu Si-pang-ya a hungti, maydih tu hungti a kakelu a palatenga' tu kalahici niza, au caay pisaybang tu cayay pisikul nizaay. . Ke-al-s i pabelin ci A-ce-te-ke-ti-kow zikuz, pala u Wa-ha-ka-ku a sakatusa nu kakitaan "Marqu√©s del Valle de Oaxaca", kakitaanay Si-pang-ya cong-tu pangangan tu zuma cacay talakaway a kakitaan ci An-tung-ni-aw.te.men-tu-sa. 1541 a mihcaan ci Ke-al-te-s taluma' tayza i Si-pang-ya, enem a mihcaan mapatay. (Marqu√©s del Valle de Oaxaca), . masakapahay ku mihcaan ci Ke-al-te-s lecuh i Ka-s-ti-ya hungti kanatal didi'ay a niyazu' May-te-lin "tini ayzaay a Su-pang-ya satipan labu nu Ay-S-te-lye-ma-tu-la" nu adidi'ay kakitaan a luma', na iSa-la-man-ka talakaway a cacudadan minanam tu hulic, i 17 ku mihcaan niza hawsa miales caay tu picudada malahitay, kilul i 1504 a mihcaan tayni i Sin-ta-lu nu Si-pang-ya a subal, ci Ke-al-te-s i subal na u malukay, kumuing, zikuz mala u tizaay nu sipunu'ay. 1511 a nihcaan ci Ke-al-ti-s mikilul ci Pey-la-s-ke-san milihiza tu kalalais ni Ku-pa a masulup, Pay-la-s-ke-s patuzu'an mala Ku-pa cung-tu zikuz,ci Ke-al-te-s napaayaw mapala situngusay tu mikuwanay tu kalisiw, zikuz ciniza misinkiw mala u kinciw nu Ku-pa-sen-ti-ya-ke, malaacawa ci Pey la-s-Ke-san tu saadidi'ay a bai. 1511ŚĻī, . 1518 a mihcaan, ci Pey-la-s-ke-s misakaput mitahaw a kaput tayza i Mow-si-ke, pala u mikeliday han ci Ke-al-te-s, Ke-al-te-s mipatang tu nu uzipay a zaysang sikulisiw tu mitakus tu tademaw, kalamkam katuud t uku matakusay a tademaw atu sapilais a salasul. i ayaw nu kamumul ayaw nu katayza i Mow-si-ke, Pey-la-s-ke-s mitengil tu liwliway tademaw a kamu, matalaw malilid ni Ke-al-te-s, pabalucu' ciniza mipalasawad tu kawaw nu mikelida. nika ci Ke-al-te-s sakay patudud ci Pey-la-s-ke-san caay paengil, kelit tu sakaput mumul tuway. 1518ŚĻī, . 1519 a mihca 2 a bulad 18 a demiad, Ke-al-te-s mikilid pakala tu 500 ku tademaw nu mamilaisay,100 kutademaw nu nanumany a hitay, 16 ku subayu, mikacaway 11 ku balunga mumul tayza i Yu-cya-tun a kasasubal. 1519 a mihca 4 a bulad mikelid tu balunga atu hitay i Mu-ow-si-ke sawali a dadipasan tatukus, midebungg tu A-ce-te-ke-tikow, katinengan itawya ci Ke-al-te-s-mikilul tu hitay caay ka 1000 ku tademaw, satu caay katatukuh 5 a mihcaan masulup tu ku A-ce-te-ke-ti-kow, mutesekay tu naemekay tulu ku angangan a lalekalan. sakacacay, mibungay, ci Ke-al-te-s mipulung tu zumaay a kitizaan nu zumaay In-ti-an a binacadan, miliyung tu A-ce-te-ke-ti-Kow tucayay kalecad ku icelang a malalebu, malecad a tatusa macacukah itawya mikuwan tu ti-kow situngusay ci Te-now-ci-ti-lan a tademaw, Te-now-ci-te-lan a hungti ci Mung-te-cu-ma tusa lasubu a mihcaan malingatu u salengaacay a tademaw sa ci Ke-al-te-s u In-tu-an a paliayaw tu kamu u salengacay ku banges a kamisama sa "sibanuhan bau a kamisama" panukas, namahiza palalabang han caay paliayaw ku balucu', sisa madayum mazakedp makuwan. saka tusa patayni tu libung, u kamu ci Ke-al-te-s milawap tu kahenulan a tuse nu ti-kow hawsa, u katineng pateng pabeli tu labuay a niyazu' nu In-tu a tademaw katuud ku malaliday tu penu' ledek a imelang a sapasasak, u libung malingatu malalilalid i tuse, ci Ke-al-te-s niladayan a Si-pang-ya a tademaw zayhan namalibungay tu, sisa caay tu kalibung, uyni caay ku miwadaay tu tademaw nu In-ti-an, sangaleb tu pikaseneng tu Si-pang-ya. saka tulu, zayhan Mey-cow kakitizaan nayi' ku sumayu, siza itawyaay a In-ti-an a tadema caay kaazih ku subayu, mangaleb caay kaazih ku mikacaway tu subayu a hitay, namahiza anu lalais sa, a pihaceng ku madukaay mapatayay. zuma a lalekalen pasu, In-ti-an a kuwang caay kadayum macucuk ku sadama a kalahay nu In-ti-an, Si-pang-ya a tademaw taneng amisuayaw tu Owya-talu tu pinaay malebut a mihcaan nataneng a malalais malingatu migingkiw, u In-ti-an nayay ku sulit "Ma-ya a sulit caay kakatuud ku micukaymasay", Si-pang-ya lamalay a salalais kanahatu caay ka icelang, nika u kakatalawan. 1521 a mihca 8 a bulad 13 a demiad ci Ke-te-s masulup tu ci A-ce-te-ke-ti-kow patizeng tu midebungay nu Si-pang-ya a mikuwan, a pangangan han niza ku midebungay u baluhay a Si-pang-ya "Nueva Espa√Īa). i likisia yadah ku nisulitan hicasa ku Ke-al-te-s misakinih ku Si-pang-ya nipatizedng tu baluhay Si-pang-ya zikuz tatenga' nai' ku canacanan, uyni ci Ke-al-te-s i tigami niza pakatukuh tu zumaay a satakus, au c I Bu-lang-si-ske.Low-pey-s.Ke-ma-la a nisulitan tu nikauzipan a kawaw iza t uku mahizaay a nizateng. nika uyni dada' a kawaw. ci Ke-al-te-snu uzipay nilahecian a kawaw, kasitungus atua nub nu balucu' taneng ciniza atu hunghti a kacacayat talaayaw a lalecus,
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == aj-ar~…ĺ-nan.k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s "kamu nu s-paŇč-ja, ńß…ôrn*n ¶ort*s, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad -**** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad", mid…ôbuŇčaj a zidaj manawaŇč i ¶ow-nan-m…ô- ¶ow a s-pan-ja nu mid…ôbuŇčaj " ¶on*uistador u imi "misur~…ĺipaj" map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° ku ma ¶akataj nu kasumamadan a a- ¶…ô-t…ô, i mu-si-k…ô patizaŇč tu nu mid…ôbuŇčaj nu si-paŇč-ja a siŇčaŇčan, aj-ar~…ĺ-nan.k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s atu r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a zidajan s-paŇč-ja nu mid…ôbuŇčaj miwawańß tu nu s-paŇč-ja-m…ô- ¶ow nu mid…ôbuŇčaj a zidajan nu saajawaj a Ňčatu. ********(****:ńß…ôrn*n ¶ort*s********************) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ka-s-ti-ja ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺan a maj-t…ô-r~…ĺin- ¶oŇč zikuz pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tajza sin-ta-r~…ĺu misakawa tu sakauzip, r~…ĺuŇčatu sanaj saajawaj tajza i i-s-pa-si-aow-r~…ĺa a subar~…ĺ, zikuz tajni tu i ku-pa, i ku-pa ¶iniza mapab…ôr~…ĺi a situŇčus tu sapid…ôput, zikuz mar~…ĺa saka tusa a subar~…ĺ nu si-paŇč-ja nijazu Ē~ °aj a tajr~…ĺin. . **** a mińß ¶aan mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺa sin-ta-r~…ĺu nu saka tur~…ĺu nu mikinsaaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj, mi…ôdap tu adidid a kar~…ĺisiw ¶iniza tujnian sakaputaj nu mikisaaj. atu ku-pa ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi ¶i ti-ja-k…ô…ô.wi-r~…ĺa-s-kaj- ¶…ô.t…ô-ku-aj-r~…ĺi-ja-ar~…ĺ a kasar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us, ajaw nu kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ niza tu sazikuzaj takusan apar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s satu ¶ajaj pisikur~…ĺ tujni a pitakus patar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. **** . ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-s katukuńß i sin-ta-r~…ĺu tu zikuz, misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, ¶iniza atu zuma m…ô- ¶ow a jin ¶umin mar~…ĺa ¶abaj, atu zumaaj a m…ô- ¶ow a jin ¶umi mar~…ĺar~…ĺais, mijuŇč ¶iniza tu ¶a ¶aj jin ¶umin a tatajna ¶i ma-r~…ĺin- ¶j…ô " taŇč-na.ma-r~…ĺi-na" uni pab…ôr~…ĺin, zikuz mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu saajawaj tatama a wawaan. ju ka-pa ¶oŇč-r~…ĺi musakamu mi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ amizak…ôp ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-san ńßawsa, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s atu ńß…ôni mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu, mir~…ĺijuŇč tu zumaaj a ńßitaj mar~…ĺa u mi…ôdapaj nu ńß…ôni mir~…ĺais makaz…ôm…ô ¶ tu, k…ô-ar~…ĺ-s kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ sa patigami tu si-paŇč-ja a ńßuŇčti, majdińß tu ńßuŇčti a kak…ôr~…ĺu a par~…ĺat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu kar~…ĺańßi ¶i niza, au ¶aaj pisajbaŇč tu ¶ajaj pisikur~…ĺ nizaaj. . k…ô-ar~…ĺ-s i pab…ôr~…ĺin ¶i a- ¶…ô-t…ô-k…ô-ti-kow zikuz, par~…ĺa u wa-ńßa-ka-ku a sakatusa nu kakitaan "mar*u*s d…ôr~…ĺ *ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô d…ô oa*a ¶a", kakitaanaj si-paŇč-ja ¶oŇč-tu paŇčaŇčan tu zuma ¶a ¶aj tar~…ĺakawaj a kakitaan ¶i an-tuŇč-ni-aw.t…ô.m…ôn-tu-sa. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tajza i si-paŇč-ja, …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶aan mapataj. (mar*u*s d…ôr~…ĺ *ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô d…ô oa*a ¶a), . masakapańßaj ku mińß ¶aan ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ka-s-ti-ja ńßuŇčti kanatar~…ĺ didi Ē~ °aj a nijazu Ē~ ° maj-t…ô-r~…ĺin "tini ajzaaj a su-paŇč-ja satipan r~…ĺabu nu aj-s-t…ô-r~…ĺj…ô-ma-tu-r~…ĺa" nu adidi Ē~ °aj kakitaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, na isa-r~…ĺa-man-ka tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, i ** ku mińß ¶aan niza ńßawsa miar~…ĺ…ôs ¶aaj tu pi ¶udada mar~…ĺańßitaj, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶aan tajni i sin-ta-r~…ĺu nu si-paŇč-ja a subar~…ĺ, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s i subar~…ĺ na u mar~…ĺukaj, kumuiŇč, zikuz mar~…ĺa u tizaaj nu sipunu Ē~ °aj. **** a nińß ¶aan ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-ti-s mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i p…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-san mir~…ĺińßiza tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺais ni ku-pa a masur~…ĺup, paj-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-s patuzu Ē~ °an mar~…ĺa ku-pa ¶uŇč-tu zikuz, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s napaajaw mapar~…ĺa situŇčusaj tu mikuwanaj tu kar~…ĺisiw, zikuz ¶iniza misinkiw mar~…ĺa u kin ¶iw nu ku-pa-s…ôn-ti-ja-k…ô, mar~…ĺaa ¶awa ¶i p…ô r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-san tu saadidi Ē~ °aj a bai. *****, . **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i p…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-s misakaput mitańßaw a kaput tajza i mow-si-k…ô, par~…ĺa u mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ńßan ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s, k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s mipataŇč tu nu uzipaj a zajsaŇč sikur~…ĺisiw tu mitakus tu tad…ômaw, kar~…ĺamkam katuud t uku matakusaj a tad…ômaw atu sapir~…ĺais a sar~…ĺasur~…ĺ. i ajaw nu kamumur~…ĺ ajaw nu katajza i mow-si-k…ô, p…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-s mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj tad…ômaw a kamu, matar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s, pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶iniza mipar~…ĺasawad tu kawaw nu mik…ôr~…ĺida. nika ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s sakaj patudud ¶i p…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-san ¶aaj pa…ôŇčir~…ĺ, k…ôr~…ĺit tu sakaput mumur~…ĺ tuwaj. *****, . **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s mikir~…ĺid pakar~…ĺa tu *** ku tad…ômaw nu mamir~…ĺaisaj,*** kutad…ômaw nu nanumanj a ńßitaj, ** ku subaju, mika ¶awaj ** ku bar~…ĺuŇča mumur~…ĺ tajza i ju- ¶ja-tun a kasasubar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mik…ôr~…ĺid tu bar~…ĺuŇča atu ńßitaj i mu-ow-si-k…ô sawar~…ĺi a dadipasan tatukus, mid…ôbuŇčg tu a- ¶…ô-t…ô-k…ô-tikow, katin…ôŇčan itawja ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s-mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ńßitaj ¶aaj ka **** ku tad…ômaw, satu ¶aaj katatukuńß * a mińß ¶aan masur~…ĺup tu ku a- ¶…ô-t…ô-k…ô-ti-kow, mut…ôs…ôkaj tu na…ôm…ôkaj tur~…ĺu ku aŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. saka ¶a ¶aj, mibuŇčaj, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s mipur~…ĺuŇč tu zumaaj a kitizaan nu zumaaj in-ti-an a bina ¶adan, mir~…ĺijuŇč tu a- ¶…ô-t…ô-k…ô-ti-kow tu ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a tatusa ma ¶a ¶ukańß itawja mikuwan tu ti-kow situŇčusaj ¶i t…ô-now- ¶i-ti-r~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, t…ô-now- ¶i-t…ô-r~…ĺan a ńßuŇčti ¶i muŇč-t…ô- ¶u-ma tusa r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu u sar~…ĺ…ôŇčaa ¶aj a tad…ômaw sa ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s u in-tu-an a par~…ĺiajaw tu kamu u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku baŇč…ôs a kamisama sa "sibanuńßan bau a kamisama" panukas, namańßiza par~…ĺar~…ĺabaŇč ńßan ¶aaj par~…ĺiajaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sisa madajum mazak…ôdp makuwan. saka tusa patajni tu r~…ĺibuŇč, u kamu ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s mir~…ĺawap tu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tus…ô nu ti-kow ńßawsa, u katin…ôŇč pat…ôŇč pab…ôr~…ĺi tu r~…ĺabuaj a nijazu Ē~ ° nu in-tu a tad…ômaw katuud ku mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu p…ônu Ē~ ° r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč a sapasasak, u r~…ĺibuŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺid i tus…ô, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s nir~…ĺadajan a si-paŇč-ja a tad…ômaw zajńßan namar~…ĺibuŇčaj tu, sisa ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺibuŇč, ujni ¶aaj ku miwadaaj tu tad…ômaw nu in-ti-an, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb tu pikas…ôn…ôŇč tu si-paŇč-ja. saka tur~…ĺu, zajńßan m…ô- ¶ow kakitizaan naji Ē~ ° ku sumaju, siza itawjaaj a in-ti-an a tad…ôma ¶aaj kaazińß ku subaju, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ¶aaj kaazińß ku mika ¶awaj tu subaju a ńßitaj, namańßiza anu r~…ĺar~…ĺais sa, a pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku madukaaj mapatajaj. zuma a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn pasu, in-ti-an a kuwaŇč ¶aaj kadajum ma ¶u ¶uk ku sadama a kar~…ĺańßaj nu in-ti-an, si-paŇč-ja a tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč amisuajaw tu owja-tar~…ĺu tu pinaaj mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan natan…ôŇč a mar~…ĺar~…ĺais mar~…ĺiŇčatu migiŇčkiw, u in-ti-an najaj ku sur~…ĺit "ma-ja a sur~…ĺit ¶aaj kakatuud ku mi ¶ukajmasaj", si-paŇč-ja r~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a sar~…ĺar~…ĺais kanańßatu ¶aaj ka i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, nika u kakatar~…ĺawan. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ¶i k…ô-t…ô-s masur~…ĺup tu ¶i a- ¶…ô-t…ô-k…ô-ti-kow patiz…ôŇč tu mid…ôbuŇčaj nu si-paŇč-ja a mikuwan, a paŇčaŇčan ńßan niza ku mid…ôbuŇčaj u bar~…ĺuńßaj a si-paŇč-ja "nu…ô*a …ôspa*a). i r~…ĺikisia jadańß ku nisur~…ĺitan ńßi ¶asa ku k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s misakinińß ku si-paŇč-ja nipatiz…ôdŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj si-paŇč-ja zikuz tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° nai Ē~ ° ku ¶ana ¶anan, ujni ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s i tigami niza pakatukuńß tu zumaaj a satakus, au ¶ i bu-r~…ĺaŇč-si-sk…ô.r~…ĺow-p…ô-s.k…ô-ma-r~…ĺa a nisur~…ĺitan tu nikauzipan a kawaw iza t uku mańßizaaj a nizat…ôŇč. nika ujni dada Ē~ ° a kawaw. ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-snu uzipaj nir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian a kawaw, kasituŇčus atua nub nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tan…ôŇč ¶iniza atu ńßuŇčńßti a ka ¶a ¶ajat tar~…ĺaajaw a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶us,
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ay-al-nan.ke-al-te-s "kamu nu S-pang-ya, Hern√°n Cort√©s, 1485 a mihca 12 a bulad -1547 a mihca 12 a bulad 2 a demiad", midebungay a ziday manawang i Cow-nan-mey-cow a S-pan-ya nu midebungay "Conquistador u imi "misulipay" mapeci' ku macakatay nu kasumamadan a A-ce-te, i Mu-si-ke patizang tu nu midebungay nu Si-pang-ya a singangan, Ay-al-nan.ke-al-te-s atu lecad a zidayan S-pang-ya nu midebungay miwawah tu nu S-pang-ya-mey-cow nu midebungay a zidayan nu saayaway a ngatu. ŚüÉÁąĺŚćó¬∑ÁßĎÁąĺÁČĻśĖĮ(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Hern√°n Cort√©sÔľõ1485ŚĻī12śúą‚ÄĒ1547ŚĻī12śúą2śó•) . nilaculan ke-al-te-s lecuh i Ka-s-ti-ya hungti a kanatalan a May-te-lin-cong zikuz pabalucu' tayza Sin-ta-lu misakawa tu sakauzip, lungatu sanay saayaway tayza i I-s-pa-si-aow-la a subal, zikuz tayni tu i Ku-pa, i Ku-pa ciniza mapabeli a situngus tu sapideput, zikuz mala saka tusa a subal nu Si-pang-ya niyazu'ay a taylin. . 1519 a mihcaan mapili' tu mala Sin-ta-lu nu saka tulu nu mikinsaay nu mikeliday, miedap tu adidid a kalisiw ciniza tuynian sakaputay nu mikisaay. Atu Ku-pa cung-li ci Ti-ya-kee.wi-la-s-kay-ce.te-ku-ay-li-ya-al a kasala'cus, ayaw nu kamulmul niza tu sazikuzay takusan apaluma', ci Ke-al-te-s satu cayay pisikul tuyni a pitakus pataluma'. 1519 . ci Ke-al-s katukuh i Sin-ta-lu tu zikuz, misabalucu' tu sakalaheci, ciniza atu zuma mey-cow a Yincumin malacabay, atu zumaay a Mey-cow a Yincumi malalais, miyung ciniza tu cacay Yincumin a tatayna ci Ma-lin-cye " Tang-na.Ma-li-na" uni pabelin, zikuz mulecuh tu saayaway tatama a wawaan. Yu Ka-pa cong-li musakamu miculcul amizakep ci Ke-al-te-san hawsa,ci Ke-al-te-s atu heni malalebu, miliyung tu zumaay a hitay mala u miedapay nu heni milais makazemec tu, Ke-al-s kakelul sa patigami tu Si-pang-ya a hungti, maydih tu hungti a kakelu a palatenga' tu kalahici niza, au caay pisaybang tu cayay pisikul nizaay. . Ke-al-s i pabelin ci A-ce-te-ke-ti-kow zikuz, pala u Wa-ha-ka-ku a sakatusa nu kakitaan "Marqu√©s del Valle de Oaxaca", kakitaanay Si-pang-ya cong-tu pangangan tu zuma cacay talakaway a kakitaan ci An-tung-ni-aw.te.men-tu-sa. 1541 a mihcaan ci Ke-al-te-s taluma' tayza i Si-pang-ya, enem a mihcaan mapatay. (Marqu√©s del Valle de Oaxaca), . masakapahay ku mihcaan ci Ke-al-te-s lecuh i Ka-s-ti-ya hungti kanatal didi'ay a niyazu' May-te-lin "tini ayzaay a Su-pang-ya satipan labu nu Ay-S-te-lye-ma-tu-la" nu adidi'ay kakitaan a luma', na iSa-la-man-ka talakaway a cacudadan minanam tu hulic, i 17 ku mihcaan niza hawsa miales caay tu picudada malahitay, kilul i 1504 a mihcaan tayni i Sin-ta-lu nu Si-pang-ya a subal, ci Ke-al-te-s i subal na u malukay, kumuing, zikuz mala u tizaay nu sipunu'ay. 1511 a nihcaan ci Ke-al-ti-s mikilul ci Pey-la-s-ke-san milihiza tu kalalais ni Ku-pa a masulup, Pay-la-s-ke-s patuzu'an mala Ku-pa cung-tu zikuz,ci Ke-al-te-s napaayaw mapala situngusay tu mikuwanay tu kalisiw, zikuz ciniza misinkiw mala u kinciw nu Ku-pa-sen-ti-ya-ke, malaacawa ci Pey la-s-Ke-san tu saadidi'ay a bai. 1511ŚĻī, . 1518 a mihcaan, ci Pey-la-s-ke-s misakaput mitahaw a kaput tayza i Mow-si-ke, pala u mikeliday han ci Ke-al-te-s, Ke-al-te-s mipatang tu nu uzipay a zaysang sikulisiw tu mitakus tu tademaw, kalamkam katuud t uku matakusay a tademaw atu sapilais a salasul. i ayaw nu kamumul ayaw nu katayza i Mow-si-ke, Pey-la-s-ke-s mitengil tu liwliway tademaw a kamu, matalaw malilid ni Ke-al-te-s, pabalucu' ciniza mipalasawad tu kawaw nu mikelida. nika ci Ke-al-te-s sakay patudud ci Pey-la-s-ke-san caay paengil, kelit tu sakaput mumul tuway. 1518ŚĻī, . 1519 a mihca 2 a bulad 18 a demiad, Ke-al-te-s mikilid pakala tu 500 ku tademaw nu mamilaisay,100 kutademaw nu nanumany a hitay, 16 ku subayu, mikacaway 11 ku balunga mumul tayza i Yu-cya-tun a kasasubal. 1519 a mihca 4 a bulad mikelid tu balunga atu hitay i Mu-ow-si-ke sawali a dadipasan tatukus, midebungg tu A-ce-te-ke-tikow, katinengan itawya ci Ke-al-te-s-mikilul tu hitay caay ka 1000 ku tademaw, satu caay katatukuh 5 a mihcaan masulup tu ku A-ce-te-ke-ti-kow, mutesekay tu naemekay tulu ku angangan a lalekalan. sakacacay, mibungay, ci Ke-al-te-s mipulung tu zumaay a kitizaan nu zumaay In-ti-an a binacadan, miliyung tu A-ce-te-ke-ti-Kow tucayay kalecad ku icelang a malalebu, malecad a tatusa macacukah itawya mikuwan tu ti-kow situngusay ci Te-now-ci-ti-lan a tademaw, Te-now-ci-te-lan a hungti ci Mung-te-cu-ma tusa lasubu a mihcaan malingatu u salengaacay a tademaw sa ci Ke-al-te-s u In-tu-an a paliayaw tu kamu u salengacay ku banges a kamisama sa "sibanuhan bau a kamisama" panukas, namahiza palalabang han caay paliayaw ku balucu', sisa madayum mazakedp makuwan. saka tusa patayni tu libung, u kamu ci Ke-al-te-s milawap tu kahenulan a tuse nu ti-kow hawsa, u katineng pateng pabeli tu labuay a niyazu' nu In-tu a tademaw katuud ku malaliday tu penu' ledek a imelang a sapasasak, u libung malingatu malalilalid i tuse, ci Ke-al-te-s niladayan a Si-pang-ya a tademaw zayhan namalibungay tu, sisa caay tu kalibung, uyni caay ku miwadaay tu tademaw nu In-ti-an, sangaleb tu pikaseneng tu Si-pang-ya. saka tulu, zayhan Mey-cow kakitizaan nayi' ku sumayu, siza itawyaay a In-ti-an a tadema caay kaazih ku subayu, mangaleb caay kaazih ku mikacaway tu subayu a hitay, namahiza anu lalais sa, a pihaceng ku madukaay mapatayay. zuma a lalekalen pasu, In-ti-an a kuwang caay kadayum macucuk ku sadama a kalahay nu In-ti-an, Si-pang-ya a tademaw taneng amisuayaw tu Owya-talu tu pinaay malebut a mihcaan nataneng a malalais malingatu migingkiw, u In-ti-an nayay ku sulit "Ma-ya a sulit caay kakatuud ku micukaymasay", Si-pang-ya lamalay a salalais kanahatu caay ka icelang, nika u kakatalawan. 1521 a mihca 8 a bulad 13 a demiad ci Ke-te-s masulup tu ci A-ce-te-ke-ti-kow patizeng tu midebungay nu Si-pang-ya a mikuwan, a pangangan han niza ku midebungay u baluhay a Si-pang-ya "Nueva Espa√Īa). i likisia yadah ku nisulitan hicasa ku Ke-al-te-s misakinih ku Si-pang-ya nipatizedng tu baluhay Si-pang-ya zikuz tatenga' nai' ku canacanan, uyni ci Ke-al-te-s i tigami niza pakatukuh tu zumaay a satakus, au c I Bu-lang-si-ske.Low-pey-s.Ke-ma-la a nisulitan tu nikauzipan a kawaw iza t uku mahizaay a nizateng. nika uyni dada' a kawaw. ci Ke-al-te-snu uzipay nilahecian a kawaw, kasitungus atua nub nu balucu' taneng ciniza atu hunghti a kacacayat talaayaw a lalecus,
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == aj-ar~…ĺ-nan.k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s "kamu nu s-paŇč-ja, ńß…ôrn*n ¶ort*s, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad -**** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad", mid…ôbuŇčaj a zidaj manawaŇč i ¶ow-nan-m…ô- ¶ow a s-pan-ja nu mid…ôbuŇčaj " ¶on*uistador u imi "misur~…ĺipaj" map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° ku ma ¶akataj nu kasumamadan a a- ¶…ô-t…ô, i mu-si-k…ô patizaŇč tu nu mid…ôbuŇčaj nu si-paŇč-ja a siŇčaŇčan, aj-ar~…ĺ-nan.k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s atu r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a zidajan s-paŇč-ja nu mid…ôbuŇčaj miwawańß tu nu s-paŇč-ja-m…ô- ¶ow nu mid…ôbuŇčaj a zidajan nu saajawaj a Ňčatu. ********(****:ńß…ôrn*n ¶ort*s********************) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ka-s-ti-ja ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺan a maj-t…ô-r~…ĺin- ¶oŇč zikuz pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tajza sin-ta-r~…ĺu misakawa tu sakauzip, r~…ĺuŇčatu sanaj saajawaj tajza i i-s-pa-si-aow-r~…ĺa a subar~…ĺ, zikuz tajni tu i ku-pa, i ku-pa ¶iniza mapab…ôr~…ĺi a situŇčus tu sapid…ôput, zikuz mar~…ĺa saka tusa a subar~…ĺ nu si-paŇč-ja nijazu ku-pa ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi ¶i ti-ja-k…ô…ô.wi-r~…ĺa-s-kaj- ¶…ô.t…ô-ku-aj-r~…ĺi-ja-ar~…ĺ a kasar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us, ajaw nu kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ niza tu sazikuzaj takusan apar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s satu ¶ajaj pisikur~…ĺ tujni a pitakus patar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. **** . ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-s katukuńß i sin-ta-r~…ĺu tu zikuz, misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, ¶iniza atu zuma m…ô- ¶ow a jin ¶umin mar~…ĺa ¶abaj, atu zumaaj a m…ô- ¶ow a jin ¶umi mar~…ĺar~…ĺais, mijuŇč ¶iniza tu ¶a ¶aj jin ¶umin a tatajna ¶i ma-r~…ĺin- ¶j…ô " taŇč-na.ma-r~…ĺi-na" uni pab…ôr~…ĺin, zikuz mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu saajawaj tatama a wawaan. ju ka-pa ¶oŇč-r~…ĺi musakamu mi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ amizak…ôp ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-san ńßawsa, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s atu ńß…ôni mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu, mir~…ĺijuŇč tu zumaaj a ńßitaj mar~…ĺa u mi…ôdapaj nu ńß…ôni mir~…ĺais makaz…ôm…ô ¶ tu, k…ô-ar~…ĺ-s kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ sa patigami tu si-paŇč-ja a ńßuŇčti, majdińß tu ńßuŇčti a kak…ôr~…ĺu a par~…ĺat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu kar~…ĺańßi ¶i niza, au ¶aaj pisajbaŇč tu ¶ajaj pisikur~…ĺ nu sipunu Ē~ °aj. **** a nińß ¶aan ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-ti-s mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i p…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-san mir~…ĺińßiza tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺais ni ku-pa a masur~…ĺup, paj-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-s patuzu Ē~ °an mar~…ĺa ku-pa ¶uŇč-tu p…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô-san ¶aaj pa…ôŇčir~…ĺ, k…ôr~…ĺit tu sakaput mumur~…ĺ tuwaj. *****, . **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s mikir~…ĺid pakar~…ĺa tu *** ku tad…ômaw nu mamir~…ĺaisaj,*** kutad…ômaw nu nanumanj a ńßitaj, ** ku subaju, mika ¶awaj ** ku bar~…ĺuŇča mumur~…ĺ tajza i ju- ¶ja-tun a kasasubar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mik…ôr~…ĺid tu bar~…ĺuŇča atu a mińß ¶aan masur~…ĺup tu ku a- ¶…ô-t…ô-k…ô-ti-kow, mut…ôs…ôkaj tu na…ôm…ôkaj tur~…ĺu ku aŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. saka ¶a ¶aj, mibuŇčaj, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s mipur~…ĺuŇč tu zumaaj a kitizaan nu zumaaj in-ti-an a bina ¶adan, mir~…ĺijuŇč tu a- ¶…ô-t…ô-k…ô-ti-kow tu ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a tatusa ma ¶a ¶ukańß itawja mikuwan tu ti-kow situŇčusaj ¶i par~…ĺiajaw tu kamu u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku baŇč…ôs a kamisama sa "sibanuńßan bau a kamisama" panukas, namańßiza par~…ĺar~…ĺabaŇč ńßan ¶aaj par~…ĺiajaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sisa madajum mazak…ôdp makuwan. saka tusa patajni tu r~…ĺibuŇč, u kamu ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s mir~…ĺawap tu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tus…ô nu ti-kow ńßawsa, u katin…ôŇč pat…ôŇč pab…ôr~…ĺi tu r~…ĺabuaj a nijazu Ē~ ° nu in-tu a tad…ômaw katuud ku mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu p…ônu Ē~ ° r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč a sapasasak, u r~…ĺibuŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺid i tus…ô, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s nir~…ĺadajan a si-paŇč-ja a tad…ômaw zajńßan namar~…ĺibuŇčaj tu, sisa ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺibuŇč, ujni ¶aaj ku miwadaaj tu tad…ômaw nu in-ti-an, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb tu pikas…ôn…ôŇč tu si-paŇč-ja. saka tur~…ĺu, zajńßan m…ô- ¶ow kakitizaan naji Ē~ ° ku sumaju, siza itawjaaj a in-ti-an a tad…ôma ¶aaj kaazińß ku subaju, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ¶aaj kaazińß ku mika ¶awaj tu subaju a ńßitaj, namańßiza anu r~…ĺar~…ĺais sa, a pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku madukaaj mapatajaj. zuma a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn pasu, in-ti-an a kuwaŇč ¶aaj kadajum ma ¶u ¶uk ku sadama a kar~…ĺańßaj nu in-ti-an, si-paŇč-ja a tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč amisuajaw tu owja-tar~…ĺu tu pinaaj mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan natan…ôŇč a mar~…ĺar~…ĺais mar~…ĺiŇčatu migiŇčkiw, u in-ti-an najaj ku sur~…ĺit "ma-ja a sur~…ĺit ¶aaj kakatuud ku mi ¶ukajmasaj", si-paŇč-ja r~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a sar~…ĺar~…ĺais kanańßatu ¶aaj ka i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, nika u kakatar~…ĺawan. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ¶i k…ô-t…ô-s masur~…ĺup tu ¶i a- ¶…ô-t…ô-k…ô-ti-kow patiz…ôŇč tu mid…ôbuŇčaj nu si-paŇč-ja a mikuwan, a paŇčaŇčan ńßan niza ku mid…ôbuŇčaj u bar~…ĺuńßaj a si-paŇč-ja "nu…ô*a …ôspa*a). i r~…ĺikisia jadańß ku nisur~…ĺitan ńßi ¶asa ku k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s misakinińß ku si-paŇč-ja nipatiz…ôdŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj si-paŇč-ja zikuz tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° nai Ē~ ° ku ¶ana ¶anan, ujni ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s i tigami niza pakatukuńß tu zumaaj a satakus, au ¶ i bu-r~…ĺaŇč-si-sk…ô.r~…ĺow-p…ô-s.k…ô-ma-r~…ĺa a nisur~…ĺitan tu nikauzipan a kawaw iza t uku mańßizaaj a nizat…ôŇč. nika ujni dada Ē~ ° a kawaw. ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-snu uzipaj nir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian a kawaw, kasituŇčus atua nub nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tan…ôŇč ¶iniza atu ńßuŇčńßti a ka ¶a ¶ajat tar~…ĺaajaw a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶us,
